chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6080 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.26990/2019 3. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Hanif Faisal Alam, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the benefit sought in this petition in 2019 was enacted in 2021 and remains available to the petitioner ever since. He states to such extent his grievance stands addressed. He states for the period prior thereto no coercive action be taken against the petitioner without issuance of show cause notice etc. Learned counsel for respondent department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
